display.purpose: Hero headline; the name carries the signature gradient.

shadows.name: red-glow-rest
shadows.purpose: Ambient lift under the primary button so the decisive control reads as live.

shadows.name: red-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover feedback on the primary button.

shadows.name: red-glow-card
shadows.purpose: Soft glow when a card leans toward the light on hover.

shadows.name: structural-lift
shadows.purpose: Neutral depth for raised timeline cards.

motion.name: pulse-dot
motion.purpose: The pulsing red 'current role' dot on the timeline.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action in a view; carries the red→blue signature gradient and a resting red glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e11d2e, #3b82f6); border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.85rem 2rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(225,29,46,0.35); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(225,29,46,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e11d2e; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary / everyday action; transparent until hover shifts border and text to Bowtie Red.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #fff; background: transparent; border: 1px solid #1f1f1f; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.85rem 2rem; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { color: #e11d2e; border-color: #e11d2e; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e11d2e; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Exhibit Card
components.description: Project / certificate exhibit: flat on black at rest, leans toward a red glow on hover.
components.html:
TCG Data Research Insight

Social Listening across YouTube, TikTok and X to read the trading-card market.
components.css: .ds-card { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; background: #111111; border: 1px solid #1f1f1f; border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.5rem; transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(225,29,46,0.15); } .ds-card-title { color: #fff; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { color: #a1a1aa; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Competition skill tag; pill with Detective-Blue text on black.
components.css: .ds-tag { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; display: inline-block; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; color: #3b82f6; background: #111111; border: 1px solid #1f1f1f; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text field; surface fill, hairline border, Bowtie-Red focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #fff; background: #0a0a0a; border: 1px solid #1f1f1f; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0.7rem 1rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #e11d2e; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(225,29,46,0.25); }

components.name: Section Eyebrow
components.description: Uppercase Detective-Blue label above a section title. Use with restraint; vary the cadence.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #3b82f6; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; }

components.name: Current Badge
components.description: Quiet 'Current' marker with a pulsing Bowtie-Red dot for the active role.
components.css: .ds-badge-current { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: rgba(225,29,46,0.15); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.2rem 0.7rem; } .ds-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #e11d2e; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(225,29,46,0.9); animation: ds-pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%,100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-dot { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: A detective's case file rendered for the web: evidence laid out on a black desk, one exhibit at a time, under a focused light. The owner is a data-driven marketer whose edge is noticing what others miss, so the interface presents findings rather than shouting features. Pure black is the desk; content arrives as discrete, well-spaced exhibits. Two signal colors cut through the dark — Bowtie Red for decisive marks, Detective Blue for clues and labels. Authority comes from restraint and craft, not decoration. The detective influence is mood, never costume.
keyCharacteristics: True-black canvas; content as spotlit exhibits, never wall-to-wall fill
Two-signal palette — red decides, blue informs — used sparingly on black
Poppins throughout; weight and size carry hierarchy, not extra typefaces
Flat at rest; a soft red glow is the only thing that lifts on interaction
Calm, intentional motion — feedback, not choreography

rules.name: The Two-Signal Rule
rules.body: Only two chromatic colors exist: Bowtie Red and Detective Blue. Red decides, blue informs. No third accent.

rules.name: The Spotlight Rule
rules.body: Color is a signal on black, capped at ~10% of any screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The No-Gradient-Text Rule
rules.body: Text is never painted with a gradient — it hurts legibility. The nav wordmark and hero name are solid Bowtie Red (#e11d2e). Gradients are for button backgrounds and the photo ring only, never letters.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Poppins only. Reach for another weight before another typeface.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Touched Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; shadow is earned by state (hover/focus/current). No permanent gray drop shadows.

dos: Do keep the canvas pure black (#000000) and let content arrive as spaced exhibits with room to breathe.
Do treat Bowtie Red (#e11d2e) and Detective Blue (#3b82f6) as scarce signals — red decides, blue informs — on ≤10% of any screen.
Do build hierarchy with Poppins weight and size; reach for a heavier weight before any second typeface.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest and let the red glow be the reward for hover/focus.
Do verify body and muted text hit ≥4.5:1, especially over background images.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion fallback and every control a visible Bowtie-Red focus ring.
donts: Don't ship the interchangeable portfolio template — hero + three identical cards + contact form.
Don't let it get cluttered or cramped; negative space is the investigator's composure.
Don't drift corporate, stiff, or formal.
Don't go childish or cartoonish: no manga halftones, kawaii faces, cartoon magnifiers, or comic props.
Don't use gradient text anywhere — it's hard to read; the wordmark and hero name are solid Bowtie Red.
Don't introduce a third accent color or a permanent gray drop shadow.
Don't let the blue eyebrow harden into scaffolding on every block, and never add numbered 01/02 section markers.
